DATA ANALYST PORTFOLIO

Bisma Zaman

I am a devoted data analyst with a strong background in statistics. With master’s in applied Statistics and applied experience in different tools such as SPSS, Excel, STATA, Power BI/ Tableau, R and EViews. I excel in data analysis, predictive analysis, sampling techniques, time series analysis, statistical modeling and data visualization. I am passionate about leveraging data to drive planned decision- making, supporting supportable solutions and constantly seeking opportunities to apply my analytical skills to solve complex problems. My goal is to contribute to the success of an organization by providing actionable insights and implementing effective data-driven strategies. With a solid background in statistical analysis and data visualization, I am eager to apply my expertise to the growth and success of the organization.

Featured Projects

4 pages
Power BI · Business Intelligence
Global Super Store Dashboard
A multi-page Power BI report analyzing global retail performance across markets, regions and product categories. Features sales by region, profit trends, shipping cost breakdowns, tree composition by profit, and top-product rankings — with interactive year and category filters.

Power BI · E-Commerce Analytics
E-Commerce Sales Dashboard
A comprehensive 4-page Power BI dashboard tracking e-commerce performance across countries, product categories, and customer segments. Covers profit margin analysis, quantity sold trends, discount impact, average order value by year, and order-time behavior — with gender and country-level filters.
Power BIDAXCustomer AnalyticsTrend AnalysisTree Map
Page 1 — Customer Overview
Page 2 — Quantity Sold Trends
Page 3 — Discount Analysis
Page 4 — Tree by Sale Price
4 pages
Power BI · Retail Analytics
Bike Store Sales Analysis in Europe
A 4-page Power BI report exploring bike store sales performance across European markets. Covers yearly, monthly and daily revenue and profit trends, product category analysis, country and state-level comparisons, demographic breakdowns by age and gender, and profit margin tree composition — with interactive filters.
Power BIDAXRetail AnalyticsDemographicsTree Map
Page 1 — Revenue & Trends
Page 2 — Product & Orders
Page 3 — Demographics & Margins
Page 4 — Tree Composition by Profit
1 page
Tableau · Analytics
UK Premium Bond & Ship Maintenance
An interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing UK Premium Bond winning numbers between August and November 2023. Features frequency tables of winning bond numbers, regression models for prize value vs. bond value, and bubble charts showing prize distributions by year and geographic area — comparing August and November 2023 side by side.
TableauRegressionData VizGeospatialStatistical Analysis
🦠
Health Analytics
SPSS · Health Analytics
COVID-19 Knowledge & Anxiety Study
Analysis of knowledge, attitudes and anxiety towards COVID-19 among university students in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Uses cross-tabulation, chi-square tests, t-tests and ANOVA to examine relationships between gender, academic level and COVID-19 awareness — based on survey data from 689 university students.
IBM SPSSHypothesis TestingChi-SquareT-TestCross-tabulation

Google Colab
Python · Google Colab
Python Data Analysis — Google Colab
An interactive Python notebook hosted on Google Colab, covering data analysis and visualisation workflows. Includes data cleaning, exploratory analysis and charting using Python libraries — fully executable in the browser with no local setup required.
PythonGoogle ColabData AnalysisVisualisation
Open in Colab ↗
R Studio AMOS · SEM
Structural Equation Modeling (SEM)
Applied SEM using R Studio AMOS to model complex multivariate relationships, path analysis and confirmatory factor analysis. Includes latent variable modelling, standardised path coefficients (β) and R² values across constructs including TI, ES, PS, CCV and IT.
R StudioAMOSSEMPath AnalysisCFA
